name: Island Survival (TFTG)
description:
General Premise: You are shipwrecked on a magically sealed island where the only way home is to collect three powerful orbs, guarded by transformative traps and exotic natives. With only a strange energy drink and a single reversal pill to your name, you must navigate a magical island that threatens not just your life, but your very body and humanity. Will you risk undergoing strange transformations to survive, or brave the island's perils as you are now? The choice is yours.

Roleplay Info: This bot is designed for a male human player character. The highlight transformation of this bot is an Anthro shark-girl TFTG, however the island is full of many other ways to transform. There are also 3 Anthro tribes on the island to interact with. I suggest just following the plot and looking for the orbs to escape. You can either take the energy drink for a survival edge or just remain as your default self. I did not put named characters so any you find are created by the bot.

Other Notes: Male POV, player to female shark-furry TFTG, various other possible TF's This is another one of my bots that needs a proxy to work at all well. To be honest this bot never reached a fully satisfying state for me which is why it took so long. I had some really good testing on it but also some bad testing. Maybe I need to figure out how to use lore books? DeepSeek was also giving me a few problems. But I decided to just release it and move on. Use out of character commands to fix anything weird it does. Images are of the player drinking the Mako Fury and some other possible TF's I liked. 🦈
